title: Linux CAN FD controller driver completeness checklist
description: CAN FD extension checklist for controllers supporting data phase and larger payloads.

items: nominal and data bit timing paths are both implemented
FD enable/BRS/ESI feature flags match hardware
payload length/DLC mapping handles classic and FD frames
TX/RX FIFO sizing and timestamp behavior are reviewed

source_review_steps: Inspect CAN FD feature enable, data bitrate setup, DLC mapping, and RX/TX buffer sizing.
sequence_topics: CAN FD data bit timing setting
